characters.appearance: A young South Asian woman in her early to mid-20s with a medium build and a brown complexion. She has dark brown, shoulder-length hair tied back in a low ponytail. Her face is oval-shaped with dark eyes and distinct eyebrows.
characters.wardrobe: A short-sleeved, collared black polo shirt and light-wash blue jeans.
characters.demeanor: Initially dejected and sad, she becomes progressively more engaged, hopeful, and happy as the conversation with the tutor continues.

characters.appearance: A young South Asian man in his early 20s with a slim build and a brown complexion. He has short, curly black hair, wears black-rimmed glasses, and has a light mustache. His features are sharp.
characters.wardrobe: A light-colored, possibly off-white, button-up shirt.

characters.appearance: A young South Asian woman in her early to mid-20s with a slim build and a fair complexion. She has long, wavy, dark brown hair styled over one shoulder. She has a small red bindi on her forehead and a warm, friendly smile.
characters.wardrobe: A bright pink sleeveless blouse and a matching sheer pink saree with a thin gold border.

scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: इंग्लिश नहीं आती? और जॉब चाहिए? यहाँ तुम्हारे जैसों के लिए कोई काम नहीं है। [You don't know English? And you want a job? There's no work for people like you here.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable, painful rejection scenario.
- Establishes the core problem: lack of English skills blocking career progress.
- Sets up the emotional low point for the protagonist.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
English nahi aati?
Aur job chahiye?
Yahan tumhare jaison ke liye koi kaam nahi hai.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character C says: इतनी उदास क्यों हो? [Why are you so sad?]
Character A says: मैं हमेशा इंटरव्यू क्लियर कर लेती हूँ, काम भी अच्छे से आता है। पर इंग्लिश की वजह से हमेशा रिजेक्ट हो जाती हूँ। [I always clear the interview, I know the work well too. But because of English, I always get rejected.]
Character C says: ये बहुत common है, और रोज़ practice करने से इसे ठीक किया जा सकता है। चलो, आज यहीं से शुरू करते हैं। [This is very common, and by practicing daily it can be fixed. Come, let's start from here today.]
Character A says: ओके। [Okay.]
Character C says: अपने बारे में कुछ बताओ। [Tell me something about yourself.]
Character A says: मेरा नाम प्रिया है। मुझे कस्टमर हैंडलिंग में तीन साल का एक्सपीरियंस है। मैं हार्ड वर्किंग भी हूँ। [My name is Priya. I have three years of experience in customer handling. I am also hardworking.]
Character C says: इसे ऐसे बोलो, I am Priya. I have three years of experience in customer handling and I am a very hardworking person. [Say it like this, I am Priya. I have three years of experience in customer handling and I am a very hardworking person.]
Character A says: Wow! ये तो बहुत आसान था। [Wow! That was very easy.]
Character C says: मैं तुम्हारे साथ 24 घंटे available हूँ। जब भी टाइम मिले, बस 15 मिनट practice कर लो। [I am available with you 24 hours. Whenever you get time, just practice for 15 minutes.]
Character A says: मैं कितने दिनों में अच्छे से इंग्लिश बोलना सीख जाऊँगी? [In how many days will I learn to speak English well?]
Character C says: बस मेरे साथ रोज़ practice करो। तुम मुझसे कोई भी सवाल पूछ सकती हो। मैं तुम्हें इंग्लिश में जवाब देना सिखाऊँगी और एक असली टीचर की तरह तुम्हारी गलतियाँ भी सुधारूँगी। [Just practice with me daily. You can ask me any question. I will teach you to answer in English and correct your mistakes like a real teacher.]
Character A says: सच में? पर ये सब सुनकर लग रहा है कि ये बहुत महँगा होगा। [Really? But hearing all this, it feels like it will be very expensive.]
Character C says: बिल्कुल नहीं, Supernova बहुत ही affordable है। [Not at all, Supernova is very affordable.]
Character A says: सच में? मैं अभी Supernova ऐप डाउनलोड करती हूँ। [Really? I will download the Supernova app right now.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the Supernova AI tutor as a friendly, supportive solution.
- Demonstrates the core app loop: user speaks, AI corrects and encourages.
- Addresses common objections (time, cost) while highlighting key features (24/7 availability, real-world practice).
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Itni udaas kyun ho?
Main hamesha interview clear kar leti hoon,
kaam bhi achhe se aata hai.
Par English ki wajah se hamesha reject ho jaati hoon.
Ye bahut common hai,
aur roz practice karne se ise theek kiya ja sakta hai.
Chalo, aaj yahin se shuru karte hain.
Okay.
Apne baare mein kuch batao.
Mera naam Priya hai.
Mujhe customer handling mein teen saal ka experience hai.
Main hard working bhi hoon.
Ise aise bolo,
I am Priya.
I have three years of experience in customer handling
and I am a very hardworking person.
Wow! Ye toh bahut aasaan tha.
Main tumhare saath 24 ghante available hoon.
Jab bhi time mile, bas 15 minute practice kar lo.
Main kitne dinon mein achhe se English bolna seekh jaungi?
Bas mere saath roz practice karo.
Tum mujhse koi bhi sawaal pooch sakti ho.
Main tumhein English mein jawaab dena sikhaungi
aur ek asli teacher ki tarah tumhari galtiyan bhi sudharungi.
Sach mein? Par ye sab sunkar lag raha hai ki ye bahut mehanga hoga.
Bilkul nahi, Supernova bahut hi affordable hai.
Sach mein? Main abhi Supernova app download karti hoon.

scenes.scene_summary:
- Displays the final call-to-action.
- Reinforces the brand name and core value propositions visually.
- Drives app downloads.
